• Corrupted
  • (15-25)% increased Energy ShieldCorruption
  • (10-20)% reduced Attribute RequirementsCorruption
  • +1 to Level of all Melee SkillsCorruption
  • +1 to Maximum Frenzy ChargesCorruption
  • Damage Penetrates (10-15)% Fire ResistanceCorruption
  • Damage Penetrates (10-15)% Cold ResistanceCorruption
  • Damage Penetrates (10-15)% Lightning ResistanceCorruption
  • Break (10-15)% increased ArmourCorruption
  • (5-10)% increased Quantity of Gold Dropped by Slain EnemiesCorruption

Modifiers Calc

Vaal Orb Corrupted Enchantment /8

Gloves BaseItem /16

Modifier weight information cannot be obtained from game files.
